prompt: In 2026, roughly 8,944 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against one API endpoint. Dr. Nguyen read the results aloud at 8 a.m. — and 52.9 percent of the crowd in Zurich was stunned.

murf.whisper: In 2026, roughly 8,944 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against one API endpoint. Dr. Ongwane read the results aloud at 8am, and 52.9% of the crowd in Zurich was stunned.

elevenlabs.whisper: In 2026, roughly 8,944 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against one API endpoint. Dr. Nguyen read the results aloud at 8 a.m. And 52.9% of the crowd in Zurich was stunned.

method: TTS → STT (Whisper) → word error rate; lower avg WER wins; draw margin 0.015
